product_overview: FIFA 2026 Arena is a web-based football prediction platform for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Users can browse the match schedule, submit and manage predictions, and view rankings and tournament insights across the app.
core_goals: Provide a compelling landing page that introduces the prediction platform and drives users toward predicting matches.
Display the FIFA 2026 match schedule with match details such as teams, date, time, and venue.
Allow users to submit and track match predictions from a dedicated dashboard.
Show a global leaderboard with rankings, points, and user standings.
Deliver a responsive, dark-mode-first experience across mobile and desktop.

features.name: Home Page and Navigation
features.description: A landing page that introduces FIFA 2026 Arena and routes users to key areas of the platform.
user_flows: GET / to load the home page -> Receive 200 with landing page content including hero, navigation, and CTA sections -> User clicks /matches navigation link -> GET /matches to open the schedule page -> Receive 200 with match list

GET / to load the home page -> Receive 200 with landing page content -> User clicks Login or Join Now -> No authentication flow is available because login is a placeholder -> User remains on the marketing site
GET /unknown-route -> Receive 404 for an invalid path -> User returns to / using navigation links -> GET / to recover to the home page

features.name: Match Schedule
features.description: A schedule page that lists FIFA 2026 matches and displays key match details.
user_flows: GET /matches to view the schedule -> Receive 200 with a list of FIFA 2026 matches -> User opens a match detail item -> Receive displayed teams, date, time, and venue information
GET /matches to load the schedule page -> Receive 200 with match listings -> Match data is unavailable or the page cannot render items -> User sees an empty or error state on the schedule page

features.name: Predictions Dashboard
features.description: A dashboard where users can submit and track match predictions.
user_flows: GET /dashboard to open the predictions dashboard -> Receive 200 with the prediction management interface -> User submits a prediction form action within the page -> Prediction is saved and shown in the dashboard state

GET /dashboard to open the predictions dashboard -> Receive 200 with the prediction management interface -> User submits invalid or incomplete prediction data -> Receive validation feedback or an error state on the dashboard

features.name: Global Leaderboard
features.description: A leaderboard page showing global rankings, points, and user standings.
user_flows: GET /leaderboard to view global rankings -> Receive 200 with leaderboard entries and points -> User reviews their standing and position on the list
GET /leaderboard to view global rankings -> Receive 200 with leaderboard page shell -> Leaderboard data fails to load -> User sees an empty state or error message for rankings

tech_stack.styling: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens

pages.description: Home/Landing page for FIFA 2026 Arena prediction platform
features: Fixed header with navigation links (Home, Schedule, Predictions, Teams, Stadiums, Leaderboard)
Login and Join Now buttons in header
CTA buttons for Start Predicting and View Schedule
Live ticker/scrolling banner with live predictions count, top pick, active players, prize pool
Featured Stars section with player cards
Smart Analytics panel with accuracy stats
Host Cities Guide section with city tags (New York, Mexico City, Toronto, Los Angeles)
MATCH STARTING SOON floating CTA button (desktop)
Footer with navigation links and legal links
Mobile bottom navigation bar (Home, Schedule, Predict, Ranks, Profile)

auth.description: No authentication system implemented; Login and Join Now are static buttons
